publications.ref: Vögtle FN, Burkhart JM, Gonczarowska-Jorge H, Kücükköse C, Taskin AA, Kopczynski D, Ahrends R, Mossmann D, Sickmann A, Zahedi RP, Meisinger C. Landscape of submitochondrial protein distribution. Nat Commun. 2017 8(1):290

Characteristics[Organism].evidence: quantitative map of submitochondrial protein distribution in S. cerevisiae

Characteristics[OrganismPart].evidence: integrated approach combining stable isotope labeling, various protein enrichment and extraction strategies and quantitative mass spectrometry to produce a quantitative map of submitochondrial protein distribution

Characteristics[Label].evidence: integrated approach combining stable isotope labeling

Characteristics[MaterialType].evidence: various protein enrichment and extraction strategies

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: quantitative mass spectrometry to produce a quantitative map

Characteristics[CellType].reasoning: S. cerevisiae is used, implying yeast cells, but specific cell type not explicitly mentioned
Characteristics[CellType].needs: explicit mention of cell type or culture conditions

STEP1_OVERVIEW.summary: この研究はS. cerevisiaeの細胞培養を用いたミトコンドリアタンパク質の定量プロテオミクス解析である。SILAC標識とショットガンプロテオミクスにより986個のタンパク質をマッピングした。酵母株情報や培養条件の詳細は不明。

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].evidence: Trypsin (Promega, sequencing grade) was added at a ratio of 1:30 and incubated at 37 °C for 12 h

Characteristics[ReductionReagent].evidence: Cysteines were reduced with 10 mM DTT for 30 min at 56 °C

Characteristics[AlkylationReagent].evidence: free sulfhydryl groups were carbamidomethylated using 30 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min at room temperature in the dark

Characteristics[Label].evidence: The medium was supplemented with natural arginine and lysine (light) or [13C6/15N4]arginine and [13C6/15N2]lysine (heavy)

Characteristics[Modification].evidence: oxidation of methionine, acetylation of protein N-termini, 13C6 15N2 Lys and 13C6 15N4 Arg as variable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].1.evidence: oxidation of methionine, acetylation of protein N-termini, 13C6 15N2 Lys and 13C6 15N4 Arg as variable modifications

Comment[FractionationMethod].evidence: Samples were resuspended in 10 mM KH2PO4 (pH 2.7) and fractionated using strong cation exchange chromatography (SCX)

Comment[NumberOfFractions].evidence: Six fractions were collected in concatenation mode

Comment[Separation].evidence: Nano-LC-MS/MS was performed on an LTQ-Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer coupled to an Ultimate 3000 RSLC

STEP2_SAMPLE_PREP.summary: サンプル調製の詳細が明らかになった。トリプシン消化、DTT還元、ヨードアセトアミドアルキル化によるタンパク質処理、SILAC標識（重軽アルギニン・リジン）を使用。強カチオン交換クロマトグラフィーで6フラクションに分画後、LC-MS/MS分析を実施。修飾として酸化、アセチル化、カルバミドメチル化を設定。

Comment[Instrument].evidence: Nano-LC-MS/MS was performed on an LTQ-Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer coupled to an Ultimate 3000 RSLC

Comment[FragmentationMethod].evidence: The 20 most intense signals... were subjected to collision induced dissociation in the ion trap with a normalized collision energy of 35%

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: The 20 most intense signals above an intensity threshold of 10⁴ and with charge states 2–5 were subjected to collision induced dissociation

Comment[IonizationType].evidence: Nano-LC-MS/MS was performed on an LTQ-Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer

Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].evidence: were subjected to collision induced dissociation in the ion trap

Comment[CollisionEnergy].evidence: collision induced dissociation in the ion trap with a normalized collision energy of 35%

Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance].evidence: MS and MS/MS tolerances of 10 ppm and 0.5 Da, respectively

Comment[FragmentMassTolerance].evidence: MS and MS/MS tolerances of 10 ppm and 0.5 Da, respectively

Comment[GradientTime].evidence: using a binary gradient... ranging from 3 to 42% B in 185 min

Comment[FlowRateChromatogram].evidence: at a flow rate of 250 nL min⁻¹

Comment[Instrument].reasoning: Q Exactive Plusも使用されているが、主たる実験ではLTQ-Orbitrap Eliteが使用されている。アンカーではQ Exactive (MS:1001911)が記載されている
Comment[Instrument].needs: どちらが主たる装置か、またはどちらもSDRFに記載すべきか判断が必要

STEP3_MS_SETTINGS.summary: 質量分析装置設定の詳細が明らかになった。主要装置はLTQ-Orbitrap Elite、CIDフラグメンテーション（35% NCE）、DDAs取得方式、185分グラジエント（250 nL/min）、MS許容差10 ppm、MS/MS許容差0.5 Da、ミスクリベージ0回に設定。ただしQ Exactive Plusも一部実験で使用されており、アンカー情報との整合性確認が必要。

Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].evidence: In total four replicates (two biological replicates with each time one forward (e.g., SNheavy/PELlight) and one reverse experiment (e.g., SNlight/PELheavy) respecively)

Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic.evidence: Material was isolated from four independent yeast cultures, of which two were grown with supplementation of heavy and two with supplementation of light amino acids

Characteristics[NumberOfTechnicalReplica.evidence: two biological replicates with each time one forward (e.g., SNheavy/PELlight) and one reverse experiment (e.g., SNlight/PELheavy) respecively

Characteristics[NumberOfSamples].evidence: In total four replicates (two biological replicates with each time one forward and one reverse experiment)

Comment[FractionIdentifier].evidence: Six fractions were collected in concatenation mode

FactorValue[CellPart].evidence: Highly purified mitochondria were generated and subjected to sonication or carbonate extraction

FactorValue[Treatment].reasoning: 論文では2つの処理方法（sonication vs carbonate extraction）でミトコンドリア膜タンパク質を分画している
FactorValue[Treatment].needs: 各rawファイルがどの処理に対応するかの情報

FactorValue[FractionIdentifier].reasoning: SCXで6フラクションに分画されているが、3個のrawファイルとフラクション番号の対応は不明
FactorValue[FractionIdentifier].needs: ファイル名からフラクション番号を判定できる明確なトークンまたは実験デザインの詳細

STEP4_RAW_FILES.summary: 実験デザインが明確化：2つの生物学的複製、各複製でforward/reverseの計4実験、SCXで6フラクション分画。ミトコンドリアに対してsonication/carbonate extractionの2つの処理を実施。3つのrawファイルとフラクション・処理条件の対応関係は、ファイル名に明確なトークンがないため推定困難。
